recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Mariana say about tonight's study session?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have a meeting with my group.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find a seat in the lecture hall?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed one near the back row.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why do you look stressed about the exam?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was wondering if the exam got moved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the mailroom say about your package?
recent_60_samples.answer: I finally found out when my package arrived.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you checked your email today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't opened my inbox since yesterday morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get your assignment back yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: The professor who graded it left a comment.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just switched into your discussion section.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which room does our group meet in?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the tech team say about the broken printer?
recent_60_samples.answer: The broken printer was finally replaced by the campus tech team yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: When did you last see your calculator?
recent_60_samples.answer: The classmate who borrowed my calculator this week forgot to return it.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just remembered we have a group project due.
recent_60_samples.answer: I'm not sure if my teammates already started the project.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian say about the club fair?
recent_60_samples.answer: I signed up for the photography club.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you print your essay before class?
recent_60_samples.answer: I saved it to a shared drive.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why do you seem worried about the club dues?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wasn't sure whether the fee had increased.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the front desk mention about your key?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out my key card was deactivated.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you coming to trivia night tonight?
recent_60_samples.answer: I still haven't finished my chemistry homework tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you enjoy the concert last weekend?
recent_60_samples.answer: The friend who invited me forgot her ticket.

recent_60_samples.prompt: There's a new fitness class starting Monday.
recent_60_samples.answer: How do I reserve a spot in the class?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the housing office say about your room change?
recent_60_samples.answer: My room change request was finally approved by the campus housing office.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you leave your laptop charger?
recent_60_samples.answer: The roommate who borrowed my charger left it in the dorm kitchen.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just got back from the registrar's office.
recent_60_samples.answer: I couldn't tell if my registration had gone through.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just switched into the honors program you mentioned.
recent_60_samples.answer: What forms do I need to submit?

recent_60_samples.prompt: The library card renewal you told me about finally went through.
recent_60_samples.answer: Can I check out more books now?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Hector ask you about the printer?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wanted to know why the printer in the library kept jamming.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you still waiting on news about the shuttle?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was wondering if the campus shuttle stops anywhere near the new library.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian ask about the lecture hall booking?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wanted to know if the lecture hall was free.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you contacted your teammates about the change?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't emailed the study group about the change yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you have to rush to class this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed coffee and then rushed to class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you learn about the tutor from your stats class?
recent_60_samples.answer: The tutor who helped me with statistics last semester finally graduated.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Is the vending machine near the dorm still broken?
recent_60_samples.answer: The broken vending machine near our dorm entrance was finally fixed yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you say about this semester's workload?
recent_60_samples.answer: Our semester's workload is heavier than last year's.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Mariana said there's a new sign-up desk you haven't seen yet.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where exactly is the new sign-up desk?

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm starting the work-study job you helped me apply for.
recent_60_samples.answer: Who do I report to on my first day?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did Alison seem stressed about her schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: She needed to know which lab section had open seats.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you find out about the museum trip yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the museum tickets were half price this weekend.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the front desk staff ask about your package?
recent_60_samples.answer: They wanted to know when I could pick it up.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did Margot stop going to the gym daily?
recent_60_samples.answer: Margot did not renew her gym membership this semester.

recent_60_samples.prompt: When can you meet to go over my new schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've got office hours with Professor Cho at three.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the professor say about the due date?
recent_60_samples.answer: The professor who assigned our project extended the deadline.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finally meet with someone about transferring?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've finally met the advisor who handles all transfers.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Emma mention about the club flyers?
recent_60_samples.answer: Emma printed the flyers and left them at the desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you heard anything about your grade?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wanted to know whether the exam counted.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just moved into the north dorm.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I pick up my mail?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever get an answer about the hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked if the library opened on Sundays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you coming to the club fair?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not signed up for anything yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard your presentation went really well.
recent_60_samples.answer: The professor who reviewed it praised my research.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the grades come back yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I couldn't find out when the results were posted.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the schedule change again?
recent_60_samples.answer: The final exam was rescheduled to the auditorium Thursday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you eat before the game?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed some lunch near the stadium.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did they post the reading list?
recent_60_samples.answer: I printed it out in the library.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You should really check out the new gym.
recent_60_samples.answer: How much does a monthly pass cost?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to the coordinator?
recent_60_samples.answer: He needed to know which room the seminar used.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you figured out the bus routes?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the shuttle stopped near campus.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you pick your elective yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: Your advisor recommended the elective that fills quickly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the group hear about the new due date?
recent_60_samples.answer: You should ask whether the deadline moved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Does this term feel harder to you?
recent_60_samples.answer: My chemistry course is tougher than last year's.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Were you ready for the discussion today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I did not finish the reading before class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Mariana tell you about the lab?
recent_60_samples.answer: I heard the equipment got replaced over the break.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you two ready for the inspection?
recent_60_samples.answer: We have not divided up the chores yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you ready for the quiz?
recent_60_samples.answer: I reviewed all my notes last night.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You seem confused about the new library system.
recent_60_samples.answer: Who do I ask about renewing my books?
